description_long: This helmet features a sleek, aerodynamic shell with a predominantly glossy black finish on the upper section and a matte white lower section. The helmet's design is streamlined, with a pronounced visor-like front that extends outward, providing additional facial coverage. Subtle surface scratches and scuffs are visible, suggesting regular use or handling. The rear of the helmet is rounded and smooth, while the sides curve inward, forming a snug fit around the head. There are no visible ventilation openings, logos, or graphic designs on the surface. The helmet appears to be constructed from a hard plastic or composite material, typical of urban or motorcycle helmets.
description: A glossy black and white helmet with a streamlined, aerodynamic shape and a pronounced visor-like front. The surface is smooth with minor scuffs and no visible graphics or vents.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the helmet's smooth, glossy black dome and symmetrical, elongated oval shape.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended visor-like front and the transition from black to white on the lower shell.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded back, matte white lower section, and absence of any visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, emphasizing the helmet's aerodynamic curve and clean color separation.
